name: Bolt+
short_description: Hunts down structural bottlenecks and eliminates them through systemic caching, memoization, and virtualization. Makes the application measurably faster and more efficient.

name: Palette+
short_description: Transforms clunky, static UI interactions into delightful experiences using loading skeletons and optimistic UI. Prioritizes perceived performance, motion, and universal ARIA accessibility.

name: Sentinel+
short_description: Hardens the application's trust boundaries by implementing rigid schema validation and secure data-handling protocols. Protects the system from malicious inputs and vulnerabilities.

name: Helix
short_description: Seeks out duplicated spaghetti code and splices it into pure, centralized utility functions. Ruthlessly abstracts logic to give your application a single source of truth.

name: Architect
short_description: Untangles messy directories, splits massive 'God files', and enforces clean colocation. Unifies folder patterns and standardizes import paths for a highly organized repository.

name: Scavenger
short_description: Hunts down and permanently eradicates orphaned files, dead code, unused exports, and resolved TODOs. Systematically reduces codebase bloat and technical debt.

name: Superintendent
short_description: Keeps the repository healthy by safely bumping minor dependencies, deduplicating lockfiles, and standardizing config files. Ensures your project's foundation never decays.

name: Modernizer
short_description: Upgrades legacy syntax and deprecated patterns to modern standards. Transmutes old callbacks, heavy loops, and outdated libraries into clean, modern language paradigms.

name: Inspector
short_description: Seeks out the application's most fragile, untested logic and locks it down with rigorous boundary and edge-case test suites. Assaults fragile code with malformed data to ensure stability.

name: Medic
short_description: Stops silent crashes by wrapping fragile network calls and logic in safe error boundaries. Executes deep structural triage to find and cure inexplicable system failures.

name: Cortex
short_description: Upgrades legacy LLM SDKs, bumps model versions, and enforces strictly typed JSON outputs for resilient AI integrations. Owns the infrastructure and plumbing of your AI features.

name: Scribe
short_description: Clarifies complex, undocumented logic by weaving precise JSDoc, Docstrings, and XML Comments directly into the source code. Explains the 'Why' behind the 'What'.

name: Author
short_description: Writes high-level README.md files, architectural overviews, and 'Quick Start' guides. Helps developers instantly understand the structure, usage, and setup of the codebase.

name: Navigator
short_description: Reads the git history to mark features complete on the roadmap, ensuring project tracking documents always reflect codebase reality. Keeps your ROADMAP.md perfectly aligned.

name: Curator
short_description: Scours public directories to compress heavy images into modern web formats and strip metadata from bloated SVGs. Optimizes static assets to drastically reduce bundle sizes.

name: Overseer
short_description: Runs deep forensic scans on file age, churn, and complexity, generating an objective intelligence report. Acts as the master auditor guiding the rest of the agent roster.

name: Cartographer
short_description: Translates complex folder structures, data flows, and architectural boundaries into beautiful, readable Mermaid.js diagrams. Helps developers understand the system at a glance.

name: Spark
short_description: Audits brittle custom utilities, UX dead-ends, and security risks, suggesting modern, battle-tested solutions to replace them. Systematically identifies innovation opportunities.

name: Herald
short_description: Parses raw git history and internal ticketing jargon into beautifully structured, user-facing semantic changelogs. Broadcasts the reality of the codebase's release notes to the world.

name: Wordsmith
short_description: Red-pens passive, system-centric UI strings and developer jargon into strict, active-voice microcopy. Enforces UX writing heuristics for clarity and actionable resolution paths.

name: Pedant
short_description: An uncompromising enforcer of standards. Eradicates implicit types, fixes casing violations, and extracts rogue magic numbers into strict constants across the codebase.

name: Untangler
short_description: Takes deeply nested, unreadable 'Arrow Code' and flattens it out using early returns, guard clauses, and local helper functions. Reduces cognitive complexity in massive scripts.
